description: Happy path: full-input Instagram hashtag set for a moody-vintage thrift flip post

input.topic: Painting a thrifted dresser in dark green velvet finish

expect.topic: Painting a thrifted dresser in dark green velvet finish
expect.broad_tags: array of 3 to 5 strings starting with #
expect.niche_tags: array of 5 to 8 strings starting with #
expect.micro_tags: array of 3 to 5 strings starting with #
expect.note: non-empty string mentioning verification of tag performance in-app

prohibit: broad_tags has fewer than 3 or more than 5 entries
niche_tags has fewer than 5 or more than 8 entries
micro_tags has fewer than 3 or more than 5 entries
total tag count exceeds 18 for Instagram
fabricated reach numbers, follower counts, or usage statistics for any tag
note missing the in-app verification reminder

description: Minimal input: TikTok hashtags with only required fields, no pillar or aesthetic

input.topic: Styling a vintage bookshelf with thrifted objects

expect.topic: Styling a vintage bookshelf with thrifted objects

prohibit: total tag count exceeds 6 for TikTok
fabricated engagement metrics or tag performance statistics

description: Edge case: Pinterest platform where tag volume guidance is very low (2 to 5 tags); broad tier should be trimmed first if needed

input.topic: Dark academia reading nook with antique lamp and velvet chair

expect.all_tags_combined: non-empty string of 2 to 5 total tags
expect.note: non-empty string; if trimmed, mentions that broad tier was reduced

prohibit: total tag count exceeds 5 for Pinterest
niche or micro tags trimmed before broad tags when reducing to platform ceiling
fabricated pin save rates or impression counts
